title: muhlenbergia thurberi
intro: Muhlenbergia thurberi, also known as Thurber's muhly, is a species of grass that is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia thurberi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
